title: Bionano Genomics (BNGO) Q3 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Bionano Genomics Q3 2024 Earnings Call - Key Discussion Points. Q3 revenue reached $6.1 million, comprising $6.6 million in core products offset by $500K in aged receivable write-downs. Non-GAAP operating expenses decreased 49% year-over-year to $16.1 million. Operating cash burn of approximately $14 million represented a 46% reduction versus prior year. Cash position of $23.4 million as of September 30, 2024. The company transitioned from pursuing broad market growth to focusing on approximately 150 routine use customers. We're driving increased utilization within existing customer base rather than expanding the installed base broadly. OGM installed base grew to 368 systems (net increase of 67 over prior year). Flow cell sales surged 27% to 7,835 units, signaling improved utilization among existing customers. Stratys system rollout progressing well with strong demand from labs recognizing higher throughput needs. Ionic sample prep system commercial rollout anticipated in 2025. New CPT code 81195 established for cytogenomic genomewide analysis for hematologic malignancies. Final pricing expected by December 2024, enabling billing beginning January 2025. Q4 2024 revenue projected at $6-7 million with 370-380 systems in installed base. Full-year 2024 revenue guidance: $28-30 million.
